for: Claude Design — point at this folder only

full_redesign_session.description: Paste PROMPT.md. Fable writes REDESIGN-PLAN.md (build handoff), then all 16 page mockups.

implementation_session.description: Build agent — implement site from Fable output.

per_page_design.description: One page at a time after plan exists.

never_load_for_design.description: Token-heavy — implementation or blog phase only
never_load_for_design.note: Full photo library is in repo scraped/assets/ — not in fable/
